channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: re4/LibreCode
item.description: LibreCode - A Ollama cursor like coding / Reversing Interface

item.title: alxndrTL/little-book-rl
item.description: The Little Book of Reinforcement Learning

item.title: cosmtrek/mindwalk
item.description: A visualization tool that replays coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase.

item.title: muscriptor/muscriptor
item.description: MuScriptor is a multi-instrument music transcription model developed by Kyutai and Mirelo.

item.title: ChatCut-Inc/agent-plugin
item.description: Plugin for agents to interact with Chatcut

item.title: sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills
item.description: Installable GitHub library of 1,900+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Autohand Code, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes specialized plugins, installer CLI, bundles, workflows, and official/community skill collections.

item.title: oso95/scroll-world
item.description: A skill that turn any brand into a scrollable 3D world

item.title: Robbyant/lingbot-video
item.description: Scaling Mixture-of-Experts Video Pretraining for Embodied Intelligence

item.title: peetzweg/opendisplay
item.description: Free, open-source Sidecar/Duet alternative — use your iPhone or iPad as a true second monitor for your Mac over USB or WiFi. Low latency H.264, Retina HiDPI, touch input.

item.title: anthropic-sonnet/claude-code-sonnet-5-free-desktop-app
item.description: claude-code claude code ai anthropic sonnet 5 free desktop claudecode terminal agent cli coding assistant developer tool automation project development bug fixing code generation local workspace setup guide installation tutorial no subscription

item.title: nasa/spacewasm
item.description: A flight-compliant WebAssembly interpreter.

item.title: MaximeRivest/riddle
item.description: The diary of Tom Riddle for the reMarkable Paper Pro — write with your pen, the page drinks your ink and answers in a flowing hand

item.title: V4bel/Januscape
item.description: (no description)

item.title: NicholasSlattery/sony-head-tracker
item.description: Use the motion sensors inside Sony headphones as a low-latency Windows head tracker for OpenTrack and simulator games.

item.title: pocket-stack/pocketjs
item.description: High-performance JSX UI outside the browser, with hardware rendering, standard Vue Vapor and Solid support, a Tailwind design system, and 60 FPS animation under an 8 MB memory budget.

item.title: chuspeeism/dashiAI-ppt-skill
item.description: An AI-agent skill that generates browser-editable presentations from multiple visual themes, exportable to HTML, PDF, and PPTX.

item.title: par274/sharpemu
item.description: An experimental PlayStation 5 emulator project.

item.title: JustVugg/colibri
item.description: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦

item.title: SmartlyDressedGames/U3-SDK
item.description: Source code for Unturned, a free open-world zombie survival sandbox game.

item.title: withmarbleapp/os-taxonomy
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Kulaxyz/token-diet
item.description: Always-on token-efficiency skill for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline). ~31% lower bill on average, no loss of correctness.

item.title: vercel-labs/native
item.description: Toolkit for building native desktop apps

item.title: Robbyant/lingbot-world-v2
item.description: Infinite Worlds with Versatile Interactions

item.title: wouterdebie/davit
item.description: A native macOS UI for Apple's platform

item.title: shepherd-agents/shepherd
item.description: A runtime substrate that turns an agent's execution into a reversible, Git-like trace, so meta-agents can observe, fork, replay, and revert any run. Couples agent and environments in a copy-on-write fork ~5x faster than docker commit, with ~95% KV-cache reuse on replay. Framework built for meta-agents to supervise, optimize, and train other agents

item.title: anthropics/jacobian-lens
item.description: Companion code for the global workspace interpretability paper

item.title: majidmanzarpour/threejs-procedural-dungeon
item.description: Real-time procedural dungeon generator in Three.js - deterministic seeds, Delaunay/MST graph layouts, room semantics, five themes, and a custom bloom/tilt-shift pipeline.

item.title: Robbyant/lingbot-vision
item.description: Self-supervised learning for spatial perception

item.title: Shpigford/knockoff
item.description: Chrome extension that filters pseudo-brand junk out of Amazon. Buy from real, established brands.

item.title: oomol-lab/open-connector
item.description: Open-source auth gateway connecting 1000+ SaaS providers to AI agents through SDK, CLI, MCP, HTTP, and OpenAPI.

item.title: synthetic-sciences/openscience
item.description: The open-source AI workbench for scientific research

item.title: HalFrgrd/flyline
item.description: Flyline: a Bash plugin to replace readline for a modern line editing experience: syntax highlighting, agent integration, rich prompts, tooltips, fuzzy history search, and more!

item.title: HduSy/tokenscope
item.description: MacOS menu-bar dashboard for Claude CLI token usage, estimated cost, and per-model / MCP / Skill breakdowns.

item.title: Archive228/loopkit
item.description: 33 battle-tested skills + minimal .claude harness for any coding agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI).

item.title: HKUDS/OpenOPC
item.description: OpenOPC: Build Your Personal AI-Native Company — Self-Built, Self-Run, Self-Grown

item.title: deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1
item.description: (no description)

item.title: davidondrej/skills
item.description: access to david ondrej's personal agent skills
